text.title: Fast vs Slow Burn Rule Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: compute-window-thresholds
step.action: Compute burn-rate threshold per window: budget_consumed / budget_for_window.

step.name: author-recording-rules
step.action: Add rate1h, rate6h, rate3d, rate30d recording rules. Names: level:service:slo_rate<window>.
step.note: Gate: If metric missing, STOP — instrument before alerting.

step.name: author-alert-rules
step.action: Author 4 alert rules per SLO referencing recording rules + threshold. Add runbook_url + for: duration.

step.name: validate-with-fake-burn
step.action: Inject synthetic burn. Confirm alerts fire per window + route correctly.
